sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁμοῦ

- Transliteration: Homou

- Phonetic: hom-oo'

- Definition:

1. together: of persons assembled together

- Origin: genitive case of homos (the same, akin to G260) as adv

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Genitive case of ὁμός homos (the same; akin to G260) as adverb; at the same place or time: - together.
